description_long: This object is a cylindrical traffic control device with a bright orange color, featuring a ribbed, translucent upper section and a solid, slightly weathered lower section. The top portion is vertically ribbed, likely to enhance visibility and light diffusion, while the bottom is a solid, opaque cylinder with a metallic appearance and visible signs of wear and dirt. Two metal handles are attached to the sides of the lower section, suggesting it can be easily carried or repositioned. A protruding metal rod or fixture is present on one side, possibly for securing or mounting the object. The surface shows scuffs, scratches, and some grime, indicating outdoor use in urban environments. No reflective stripes, logos, or text are visible on the exterior.
description: A cylindrical orange traffic control device with a ribbed translucent top, solid weathered base, and metal handles for carrying.
description_view_0: Front view shows the ribbed orange top, solid cylindrical base, and a single metal handle and protruding rod on the left side.
description_view_1: This side view highlights the metal handle and rod more clearly, with the ribbed top and weathered base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displays both metal handles extended outward and the ribbed top, with the base showing more surface wear.
description_view_3: Opposite side view reveals the second metal rod and handle, with the ribbed top and scuffed base in clear view.
attribute_reflective_stripes: No reflective stripes are present on the object.
attribute_tip_design: The tip is flat, ribbed, and solid orange, with a translucent plastic appearance and no attachments.
attribute_base_design: The base is a thick, solid cylinder made of metal or heavy plastic, with visible wear and dirt, providing stability.
attribute_presence_of_logos_or_markings: No logos, text, or other markings are visible on the object.
attribute_condition: The object appears worn and dirty, with visible scuffs, scratches, and grime from outdoor use.
